⚙️ Features

Everything You Need to Trade Smarter

Professional-grade tools built for discretionary, algorithmic, and hybrid traders.

📈

Strategy Backtesting

Replay your exact strategy across any historical period. See what works before risking real capital.

  • ✓ Historical replay engine
  • ✓ Custom parameter sweeps
  • ✓ Walk-forward optimization
📓

Trade Journaling

Log every trade with screenshots, notes, and emotions. Build an unbeatable edge through reflection.

  • ✓ Screenshot attachments
  • ✓ Emotion tagging
  • ✓ Multi-account support
📊

Powerful Analytics

Equity curves, drawdown charts, session heatmaps, and correlation matrices — all in real time.

  • ✓ Equity curve analysis
  • ✓ Session heatmaps
  • ✓ Drawdown visualizer
⚡

MT5 Real-Time Sync

Connect your MetaTrader 5 account once and have all trades imported automatically in seconds.

  • ✓ Automatic import
  • ✓ All major brokers
  • ✓ Live P&L streaming
🤖

AI-Powered Reports

Get weekly AI-generated insights highlighting your strengths, weaknesses, and improvement areas.

  • ✓ Weekly AI digest
  • ✓ Pattern recognition
  • ✓ Personalized coaching
🏆

Community & Leaderboard

Join thousands of traders, share strategies anonymously, and climb the monthly performance board.

  • ✓ Global leaderboard
  • ✓ Strategy sharing
  • ✓ Weekly challenges

🗺️ Process

Up and Running in 3 Steps

Connect your broker, start logging, and watch your performance transform.

01
🔗

Connect

Link your MT5/MT4 broker account via our secure API. Works with 150+ brokers worldwide in under 2 minutes.

02
📝

Track

Every trade syncs automatically. Add notes, screenshots, and emotion tags to build your personal playbook.

03
🚀

Improve

Review AI-generated insights, spot patterns, fix weaknesses, and watch your win rate climb week over week.

❓ FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about TradeFXBook.

TradeFXBook supports over 150 MT5-compatible brokers worldwide, including IC Markets, Pepperstone, OANDA, Forex.com, IG, and many more. If your broker provides MT5 access, it will work. You can also import trades manually from any broker via CSV.
All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). We use read-only API keys — TradeFXBook can never place or modify trades on your behalf. Your data is stored in ISO 27001-certified data centers and we undergo regular third-party security audits.
You install a lightweight MT5 Expert Advisor (EA) that we provide. It runs on your terminal and pushes trade data to our servers every few seconds via a read-only, encrypted webhook. There's nothing to configure beyond a single API key — setup takes under 3 minutes.
Absolutely. There are no lock-in contracts. You can cancel Pro or Elite from your account settings at any time and you'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. We also offer a 14-day money-back guarantee — no questions asked.
The AI analyzes your trade history every week and generates a personalized report covering: your best and worst trading sessions, instrument correlations, time-of-day performance, emotional patterns inferred from trade notes, risk-adjusted return, and specific tactical recommendations. Elite users receive daily snapshots.
Yes! Both Pro and Elite plans come with a 14-day free trial — no credit card required. You get full access to every feature during the trial period. After 14 days, you choose whether to subscribe or downgrade to the free plan. We'll remind you 3 days before the trial ends.
